commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens Policy plugin validation for unsupported policy sections/rule keys and carries new data-handling policy conformance plus session-maintenance default documentation from the stacked branch.

PR surface: Source +1083, Tests +577, Docs +50. Total +1710 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks unsupported-key rejection in the policy shape path, and the PR discussion includes real CLI proof for the new top-level rejection behavior. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
